invariants_acknowledged: Health check endpoints must use adapter checkConnection/getAccessToken, not Math.random
Unknown status returned when connector credentials are missing
Tests must be deterministic — no flaky retry loops

kpi_results.kpi: 0 random health checks in integrations router
kpi_results.target: 0 Math.random calls in health check functions
kpi_results.actual: 0 Math.random calls in health checks (checkSapHealth, checkStripeHealth, checkPayPalHealth, checkGmailHealth, checkOutlookHealth, checkSlackHealth, checkTeamsHealth). All 7 use adapter checkConnection/getAccessToken.

kpi_results.target: All tests deterministic via fixture injection
kpi_results.actual: 19 tests pass deterministically using setConnectorHealthProviderForTests with fixed HEALTH_CHECK_FIXTURES. No retry loops or flaky assertions.

kpi_results.kpi: Health summary includes unknown status for unconfigured connectors
kpi_results.target: Unknown status returned when credentials missing
kpi_results.actual: unknownHealth() returns status:'unknown' with descriptive error when missingRequiredEnv detects absent env vars. Test 'should count unknown statuses in summary' and 'should report unknown health checks as unavailable' verify this.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: integrations router health endpoints use adapter checkConnection/getAccessToken instead of Math.random
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 7 per-connector health check functions (lines 218-399) all use adapter.checkConnection() or adapter.getAccessToken() via loadAdapters(). Zero Math.random in health code paths.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: unknown status is returned when health check credentials are missing
definition_of_done_items.evidence: missingRequiredEnv() check at top of each health function returns unknownHealth('Health check not configured: missing ...') when env vars absent (e.g., line 228-229).

definition_of_done_items.criterion: deterministic tests replace flaky retry loops
definition_of_done_items.evidence: setConnectorHealthProviderForTests() (line 402-406) allows tests to inject fixed HEALTH_CHECK_FIXTURES. All 19 tests use this deterministic provider. No setTimeout retries or random-dependent assertions.

notes: Category 4 repair: legacy completed task with no plan file. Code was fully implemented and working. This attestation validates the existing implementation with real validation runs. Math.random remaining in triggerSync (lines 494-496) is for sync simulation, not health checks — out of scope for IFC-213.
